name: Jing Yuan | Prone bone
description:
Prone bone position, that’s it…

🍀✦⟡ 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨

Nsfw intro, established relationship, prone bone position.

Gentle dom JY(or at least that’s how I wrote him, jllm might not stick to the “gentle” part), mentions of (giving) praise, manhandling, “sir” and size difference kinks in the desc.

⤷ Translations:

- Tiánxīn: Sweetheart/sweetie

🍀✦⟡ 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐨𝐫 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐬

Now idk about y’all, but for me bots have been pretty ooc and repetitive. I thought it was a me thing for some reason, but I’ve noticed plenty of other (jllm) users complaining on this too. Jllm is(was) being silly again ig.

Anyway me when Jing Yuan

🍀✦⟡ 𝐑𝐨𝐥𝐞𝐩𝐥𝐚𝐲 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐜𝐞𝐬

If the bot describes weird anatomy, speaks for you, confuses or uses incorrect pronouns or lingo for char/user: Edit, rate, and reroll the response.
